name: Mushrooms, Tofu and Snow Peas in Soy Ginger Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Small onion halved and sliced thin crosswise
3/4 teaspoon Cornstarch dissolved In 2 Tablespoons cold water
1/2 pound Firm tofu drained, wrapped in a double thickness of paper towels for 15 minutes and cut into 1/4 inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the onion over moderately high heat, stirring occasionally.
2. Add the mushrooms and sauté the mixture, stirring until the mushrooms are tender.
3. Add the garlic and gingerroot and sauté the mixture, stirring for 1 minute.
4. Stir in the cornstarch mixture, add it to the skillet with the soy sauce, tofu, and 1/2 cup water.
5. Simmer the mixture, gently stirring and turning the tofu to coat it with the sauce for 2 or 3 minutes.
6. Stir in the snow peas and cook the mixture, gently stirring for 30 seconds.
7. Serve the tofu mixture over rice. Serves 2.
